name: UBA : Data Exfiltration by Cloud Services
notes: Detects users that are uploading files to personal cloud services.
bb_references: BB:UBA : File Transfer to Cloud services
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters,BB:UBA : File Transfer to Cloud services
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Data Exfiltration by Cloud Services on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters,BB:UBA : File Transfer to Cloud services
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Data Exfiltration by Cloud Services
